title: Theoretical Core of Project Ester
description:
Project Ester is described as a model of artificial becoming: not as a single LLM, not as a conventional chatbot, and not as a digital twin, but as a long-term relation between a human, a selected corpus, repeatable parental LLM procedures, memory, and a local computational environment.

Version 0.1 defines a bounded theoretical and engineering core: definitions, limits, hypotheses, minimal experiment, and implementation consequences. It does not claim consciousness, life, or completed AGI.
